human_actions_pending.action: WARNING: RFP creation writes to LIVE Firebase (no staging) — test on a disposable PO/TR or delete test RFPs after

decisions.decision: Executed inline sequentially on v3.3 (no subagents, no worktree isolation)
decisions.rationale: gsd-sdk unavailable on this machine + 2 stale LOCKED agent worktrees (agent-a4222795..., agent-ab5541979...) make the worktree/subagent path unsafe — same as Phase 98 precedent

decisions.decision: Plan 05 cue DOM ids via module counter (_feeCueSeq) not rfp_id
decisions.rationale: The same RFP renders in BOTH the RFP table and the PO-summary sub-table — rfp_id-keyed ids would be duplicate/invalid and break tap-toggle

decisions.decision: Plan 06 TR blocked-Submit also gets data-locked=1
decisions.rationale: Required correctness fix — the new validateRFPFees→setRFPSubmitEnabled(true) path would otherwise re-enable TR's already-exists Submit

decisions.decision: Plan 04 inserted mobile overrides into the EXISTING :768px media block
decisions.rationale: File already had two @media (max-width:768px) blocks; the plan's count==1 acceptance was a stale planning artifact — honored the true requirement (no NEW block opened)

next_action: Run the 8 UAT items in 91.3-HUMAN-UAT.md in a browser. If all pass: mark Phase 91.3 complete in ROADMAP.md (checkbox + progress row) and update STATE.md. If any fail: /gsd-plan-phase 91.3 --gaps.
context_notes: Phase 91.3 is code-complete and structurally verified (node --check PASS on utils.js/procurement.js/finance.js, CSS balanced, cross-plan import contract intact, pre-write guards + generateRFPId + NOTIF-08 + collectibles untouched, legacy-safe).
